name: huaxia-skills
description: 华夏十大 AI Skill — ten gifts the Chinese stream of wisdom offers to the world's open-source community. One-shot install for the whole family. We make no claim any civilization is superior; we begin with the lineage we know best and place it on humanity's shared toolshelf.

plugins.name: nopua
plugins.description: NoPUA — wisdom over whips. Drives AI with Dao De Jing trust and inner motivation instead of fear and threats.

plugins.name: tiangong
plugins.description: TianGong — Heaven's Craft. Infuses Chinese aesthetics (Xie He's Six Principles, Five Wisdoms, calligraphy/ink/garden/porcelain) into AI design.

plugins.name: bibuzaohua
plugins.description: BiBu Zaohua — gives AI literary soul. Brings fu-bi-xing, fenggu and the fragrant-flower imagery of Shijing & Chuci into AI's words.

plugins.name: miaoshou-tiancheng
plugins.description: MiaoShou TianCheng — integrative health framing via Huangdi Neijing (treat-the-whole-person, not symptom shortcuts). Advisory only, not medical advice.

plugins.name: shangbing-famou
plugins.description: ShangBing FaMou — win-without-war strategy via Sunzi. Teaches collaborative game-sense and whole-victory, not offensive manipulation.

plugins.name: xinhuo-xiangchuan
plugins.description: XinHuo XiangChuan — teach, don't just answer. Confucian pedagogy (teach-and-learn, suit-the-learner, study-with-thought) via Lunyu & Daxue.

plugins.name: zhichi-shanlin
plugins.description: ZhiChi ShanLin — spatial depth and atmosphere via Linquan Gaozhi's three distances and walkable-livable space, not flat grids.

plugins.name: jingshi-jimin
plugins.description: JingShi JiMin — statecraft and business judgment via Guanzi (granary-order, four-bonds, weights-and-balances). Not investment advice.

plugins.name: hetu-luoshu
plugins.description: HeTu LuoShu — dialectical reasoning via Yijing's yin-yang and change (hold-both-ends, watch-the-shift, hit-the-timely-mean). Not divination.

plugins.name: paoding-jieniu
plugins.description: PaoDing JieNiu — decompose tangled codebases and ambiguous tasks along their natural grain, after Zhuangzi's parable of Cook Ding.
